installCommand: REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD") && (uv pip install --system -r "$REPO_ROOT/requirements.txt" || python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r "$REPO_ROOT/requirements.txt") && npm ci --prefix "$REPO_ROOT/frontend"
buildCommand: REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD") && npm run build --prefix "$REPO_ROOT/frontend"
